---
title: "Geography"
subtitle: "Where the region's nonprofits are — and where they aren't"
---

::: {.key-finding}
<span class="kf-label">Key finding</span>
The region's nonprofit infrastructure is heavily concentrated in two urban
cores: **Spokane County and Kootenai County together host about three-quarters
of all active nonprofits** in the seven-county region. But density tells a
different story — the small university and rural counties (Whitman, Latah,
Lincoln) actually have **more nonprofits per resident** than Spokane, while
fast-growing Kootenai County has the region's thinnest per-capita coverage.
:::

{{< include _shared.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
orgs = FileAttachment("data/orgs_active.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
countySummary = FileAttachment("data/county_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
zipGaps = FileAttachment("data/zip_gaps.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
L = require("leaflet@1.9.4")
```

## Interactive map of nonprofit locations

Every dot is an active nonprofit at its registered (geocoded) address. Filter
by category or county, and click any dot for details. Human services
organizations (NTEE groups I, J, K, L, O, P) can be highlighted in red.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof mapCategory = Inputs.select(
  ["All categories"].concat(Array.from(new Set(orgs.map(d => d.subsector_name))).sort()),
  {label: "Category"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof mapCounty = Inputs.select(
  ["All counties"].concat(Array.from(new Set(orgs.map(d => d.county))).sort()),
  {label: "County"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof highlightHS = Inputs.toggle({label: "Highlight human services", value: true})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
mappable = orgs.filter(d => d.lat != null && d.lon != null && !isNaN(d.lat))
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
mapFiltered = mappable.filter(d =>
  (mapCategory === "All categories" || d.subsector_name === mapCategory) &&
  (mapCounty === "All counties" || d.county === mapCounty)
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
dotMap = {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "map-frame";
  div.style.height = "540px";
  const map = L.map(div, {scrollWheelZoom: false});
  map.setView([47.55, -117.1], 7);
  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
    attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> &copy; <a href="https://carto.com/attributions">CARTO</a>',
    maxZoom: 18
  }).addTo(map);
  const layer = L.layerGroup().addTo(map);
  const renderer = L.canvas({padding: 0.3});
  return {div, map, layer, renderer};
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
dotMap.div
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
mapUpdate = {
  const {map, layer, renderer, div} = dotMap;
  layer.clearLayers();
  // Leaflet needs the container to have been laid out before sizing correctly
  setTimeout(() => map.invalidateSize(), 60);
  const hsSet = new Set(["I", "J", "K", "L", "O", "P"]);
  for (const d of mapFiltered) {
    const isHS = highlightHS && hsSet.has(d.ntee_major);
    const m = L.circleMarker([d.lat, d.lon], {
      renderer,
      radius: isHS ? 4.5 : 3.5,
      color: "#ffffff",
      weight: 0.8,
      fillColor: isHS ? GU.red : GU.s1,
      fillOpacity: 0.75
    });
    m.bindPopup(
      `<strong>${d.name}</strong><br>` +
      `${d.city ?? ""}, ${d.state} ${d.zip}<br>` +
      `${d.subsector_name}${d.ntee ? " · NTEE " + d.ntee : ""}<br>` +
      (d.revenue > 0 ? `Most recent revenue: ${fmoney(d.revenue)}` : "No revenue reported")
    );
    layer.addLayer(m);
  }
  return mapFiltered.length;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
md`<span style="color:${GU.muted}; font-size:0.85rem;">Showing **${fnum(mapUpdate)}** organizations${highlightHS ? html` — <span style="color:${GU.red}">&#9679;</span> human services, <span style="color:${GU.s1}">&#9679;</span> all other` : ""}. Dots mark registered mailing addresses.</span>`
```

## Nonprofit density by ZIP code

Circle size shows the number of active nonprofits in each ZIP; color shows
nonprofits per 1,000 residents (darker = denser). Downtown ZIPs act as the
sector's "headquarters districts" — nonprofit addresses cluster where offices,
mail service, and visibility are, not necessarily where clients live.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
zipMappable = zipGaps.filter(d => d.lat != null && !isNaN(d.lat) && d.population > 0)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
zipColor = {
  const vals = zipMappable.map(d => d.orgs_per_1k).sort(d3.ascending);
  const scale = d3.scaleQuantile().domain(vals).range([GU.seq[0], GU.seq[2], GU.seq[4], GU.seq[5], GU.seq[6]]);
  return scale;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
zipMap = {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "map-frame";
  div.style.height = "480px";
  const map = L.map(div, {scrollWheelZoom: false});
  map.setView([47.55, -117.1], 7);
  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
    attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> &copy; <a href="https://carto.com/attributions">CARTO</a>',
    maxZoom: 18
  }).addTo(map);
  const rScale = d3.scaleSqrt().domain([1, d3.max(zipMappable, d => d.n_orgs)]).range([4, 26]);
  for (const d of zipMappable) {
    L.circleMarker([d.lat, d.lon], {
      radius: rScale(d.n_orgs),
      color: "#ffffff",
      weight: 1,
      fillColor: zipColor(d.orgs_per_1k),
      fillOpacity: 0.8
    }).bindPopup(
      `<strong>ZIP ${d.zip}</strong> · ${d.county}<br>` +
      `${fnum(d.n_orgs)} nonprofits · ${fnum(Math.round(d.population))} residents<br>` +
      `${d3.format(".1f")(d.orgs_per_1k)} per 1,000 residents<br>` +
      `${fnum(d.n_human_services)} human services orgs`
    ).addTo(map);
  }
  setTimeout(() => map.invalidateSize(), 60);
  return {div, map};
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
zipMap.div
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
md`<span style="color:${GU.muted}; font-size:0.85rem;">Circle size = number of nonprofits; color = nonprofits per 1,000 residents (${html`<span style="color:${GU.seq[0]}">&#9632;</span>`} lowest quintile → ${html`<span style="color:${GU.seq[6]}">&#9632;</span>`} highest). ZIPs with under 100 residents excluded.</span>`
```

## County comparison: totals vs. density

Raw counts put Spokane far ahead; per-capita density flips the ranking. High
per-resident counts in Whitman, Latah, and Lincoln counties reflect how many
civic institutions — granges, booster clubs, fraternal groups, college-town
organizations — small communities sustain relative to their size.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 130,
  marginRight: 70,
  marginBottom: 45,
  height: 300,
  width: 900,
  style: {fontSize: "13px"},
  x: {label: "Active nonprofits", labelAnchor: "center", grid: true, tickFormat: "~s"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(countySummary, {
      x: "n_orgs",
      y: "county",
      sort: {y: "-x"},
      fill: GU.s1,
      rx: 3,
      insetTop: 2,
      insetBottom: 2,
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${d.county}\n${fnum(d.n_orgs)} nonprofits\n${fnum(Math.round(d.population))} residents`
    }),
    Plot.textX(countySummary, {
      x: "n_orgs",
      y: "county",
      text: d => fnum(d.n_orgs),
      dx: 6,
      textAnchor: "start",
      fill: GU.ink,
      fontSize: 12
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0], {stroke: "#c3c2b7"})
  ]
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 130,
  marginRight: 70,
  marginBottom: 45,
  height: 300,
  width: 900,
  style: {fontSize: "13px"},
  x: {label: "Active nonprofits per 10,000 residents", labelAnchor: "center", grid: true},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(countySummary, {
      x: "orgs_per_10k",
      y: "county",
      sort: {y: "-x"},
      fill: GU.s1,
      rx: 3,
      insetTop: 2,
      insetBottom: 2,
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${d.county}\n${d3.format(".1f")(d.orgs_per_10k)} per 10k residents\n${fnum(d.n_orgs)} orgs / ${fnum(Math.round(d.population))} residents`
    }),
    Plot.textX(countySummary, {
      x: "orgs_per_10k",
      y: "county",
      text: d => d3.format(".1f")(d.orgs_per_10k),
      dx: 6,
      textAnchor: "start",
      fill: GU.ink,
      fontSize: 12
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0], {stroke: "#c3c2b7"})
  ]
})
```

::: {.chart-note}
Source: NCCS Business Master File (June 2026 vintage), geocoded state marts;
population from ACS 2019–2023 5-year estimates. See [Methodology](methodology.qmd).
:::

## County detail

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(
  countySummary.map(d => ({
    County: d.county_state,
    "Nonprofits": d.n_orgs,
    "Per 10k residents": +d3.format(".1f")(d.orgs_per_10k),
    "Human services orgs": d.n_human_services,
    "Population": Math.round(d.population),
    "Total reported revenue": fmoney(d.total_revenue),
    "Median HH income": fmoney(d.median_hh_income)
  })),
  {sort: "Nonprofits", reverse: true, layout: "auto"}
)
```
